manifest.name: historical_bootstrap
manifest.description: Simple historical block bootstrap over multivariate return vectors.
manifest.notes: Resamples empirical return vectors and preserves same-date cross-sectional dependence.

manifest.name: pytorchts_timegrad
manifest.description: External adapter around pytorch-ts TimeGrad for multivariate probabilistic forecasting.
manifest.notes: Requires the optional pytorch-ts TimeGrad dependencies; adapter consumes forecast horizon and context length through the structural task contract.

manifest.name: stochastic_volatility_bootstrap
manifest.description: Historical residual bootstrap with recursively simulated stochastic volatility.
manifest.notes: Uses EWMA volatility scaling and bootstrapped standardized residual vectors.
